data.title: Global Industrial Micro Filter Market valued at US$1035 million in 2024, expected to reach US$1469 million by 2031 with a CAGR of 5.2%.
data.description: In Bangalore, India, as of October 17, 2025, the market size of the Industrial Micro Filter was reported to be US$ 1035 million in 2024. It is forecasted to increase to US$ 1469 million by 2031, representing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.2%.

data.title: Investors urged by law firm to contact it for losses in securities class action lawsuit against Molina Healthcare, Inc.
data.description: In Radnor, Pennsylvania on October 17, 2025, Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP, a law firm, issued a notification via PR Newswire announcing the initiation of a securities class action lawsuit against Molina Healthcare, Inc. ("Molina") trading under NYSE: MOH. The lawsuit is on behalf of investors who bought or had interests in Molina. For further information, the law firm's website is www.ktmc.com.

data.title: Phase Change Memory market valued at USD 669M in 2024, projected to reach USD 27.02B by 2031, with a 70.6% CAGR growth.
data.description: In Bangalore, India, as of October 17, 2025, the market size of Phase Change Memory was reported to be USD 669 million in 2024. Forecasts suggest that this market is estimated to grow significantly and reach USD 27,020 million by 2031. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 70.6% during the forecast period.

data.title: Henry Repeating Arms introduces new models for Marine Corps' 250th anniversary after a successful sold-out previous release.
data.description: In Rice Lake, Wisconsin, on October 17, 2025, Henry Repeating Arms, a prominent firearms manufacturer in the United States, is expanding on its previous success with a tribute to the 250th anniversary of the United States Marine Corps that has already sold out. The company is releasing two new models, including the Spirit of the Corps.

data.title: Bombardier redeems all $166.29M 7.125% Senior Notes due 2026 and $83.71M of its 7.875% Senior Notes due 2027.
data.description: Bombardier Inc. revealed today that it has fully redeemed all remaining outstanding 7.125% Senior Notes due 2026, totaling US$166,289,000, and a portion of its 7.875% Senior Notes due 2027, totaling US$83,711,000. The redemption of these notes, collectively referred to as the "Redemption Notes," was carried out on October 4, 2025, following the notices of redemption issued on September 4, 2025.

data.title: Stock market falls after huge China tariffs, but rises with Trump's reassurance. Dow Jones Futures up. Oracle AI World ahead.
data.description: Stocks plummeted after President Trump announced substantial tariffs on China on Friday, causing uncertainty in the market. However, Trump reassured the public on Sunday by stating that everything will eventually stabilize. The upcoming Oracle AI World event is anticipated amidst this economic turmoil. Dow Jones futures are showing an increase, following Trump's remarks on delaying a potential additional 100% tariff on Chinese imports. The situation is fluid, as investors closely monitor developments in the ongoing trade dispute.

data.title: New tariffs set: low on timber imports, high on furniture and kitchen cabinets to aid domestic manufacturers.
data.description: The White House has imposed a modest tariff on timber and lumber imports, while implementing a notably higher tariff on furniture and kitchen cabinets. This move aims to protect domestic industries, with the tariffs set at around X% for timber and lumber, and Y% for furniture and kitchen cabinets. The decision comes amidst efforts to balance trade and support local production, with the tariffs likely to impact the pricing and availability of these goods in the market.

data.title: Global Network API market expected to reach $6.13 Bn by 2030, growing at 25.7% CAGR from 2025 ($1.96 Bn).
data.description: Dublin: The "Network API Market" report offers insights on API Type (Device Status, Identity, Location, Network Performance), Applications (IoT, Priority Communication, Anti-fraud, Entertainment & Content Distribution, Enterprise IT, Autonomous Vehicles), and Verticals. The market is valued at approximately USD 1.96 billion in 2025 and is expected to grow to USD 6.13 billion by 2030, indicating a CAGR of 25.7% during the forecast period from 2025 to 2030.

data.title: New rule by Trump administration extends trade restrictions on "entity list" orgs to majority-owned subsidiaries, expanding global tech net.
data.description: The Trump administration has introduced a regulation stipulating that trade limitations for entities listed on the “entity list” will be extended automatically to any subsidiary that is majority-owned.

data.title: NowVertical Group Inc. (TSXV: NOW) retires $5,069,000 in convertible debentures, strengthening balance sheet.
data.description: Toronto, Oct. 06, 2025 - NowVertical Group Inc. (TSXV: NOW), a prominent provider of data and AI solutions, has announced the maturity of its convertible debentures issued on October 5, 2022. The Company fulfilled its obligations by repaying $5,069,000 to the registered holder of the Debentures. This repayment was made possible through funds from its senior secured facilities agreement with NowVertical UK Ltd., affiliates, and HSBC UK Bank plc.

data.title: Dow Jones falls by 900 points following Trump's threat of increased tariffs on China. Markets react negatively.
data.description: Following President Trump's threat of a substantial rise in Chinese tariffs, the Dow Jones took a steep dive, losing a significant 900 points in the stock market today. Trump's hardline stance with China is believed to have triggered this drop in market performance.

data.title: Phixius by Nacha wins 2025 Datos Impact Award for Best Technology Innovation in Integration, processed 10 million validations.
data.description: Reston, Virginia - Nacha revealed that Phixius has won the Best Innovation in Technology and Integration award for 2025 from Datos Insights. This award acknowledges Phixius for offering a secure account validation solution via APIs that simplifies access to various data providers through a unified integration point. Introduced in 2021, the platform has shown remarkable progress. Phixius has processed over 10 million validations to date.

data.title: S&P, Nasdaq reach highs on rate-cut prospects; Dow rises with Nvidia investing in xAI. Rocket Lab, AST Space soar.
data.description: Today, the Dow experienced growth in the stock market as Nvidia is said to be investing in Elon Musk's xAI. This caused Rocket Lab and AST Space to surge. The S&P and Nasdaq reached record highs due to speculation of a potential rate cut, leading to increases in AMD and Nvidia stock prices.

data.title: Dow Jones dips, AppLovin plummets; Tesla and Palantir rise. Cathie Wood buys China stock. Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Today, the stock market saw a decline in the Dow Jones index as AppLovin experienced a significant drop. However, Tesla and Palantir showed strong performance and rallied on the stock market. Notably, prominent investor Cathie Wood made a noteworthy purchase of a Chinese stock. The market dynamics led to a mixed day of trading with key indices reflecting these movements. The information detailing these events was presented in live coverage, indicating the fluctuations and actions within the market.
